title: JOYIN 72 pcs Mini Bubble Wands Age 3+, Bubbles Party Bag Fillers, Bubble Tube, Mini Bubbles for Party Bags, Wedding Engagement Anniversary Classroom Party Favors Gift, Game prizes
features: COMPREHENSIVE SET. Mini Bubble Wands Summer Kids Activities includes 72 pieces of bubbles mini wands in 2 shapes (Circle & Heart), it also comes in 6 colors red, orange, yellow, green, blue, purple, and white.
UNIQUE DESIGN & EASY TO USE. A lot of bubbles come out when you blow or wave around. It's easy to use, easy to attach and great quality.

IDEAL GIFT. Great for Themed Party, Activity, Camping Trips, Halloween, Ceremony, Carnival, Easter, Birthday Gifts, Pool, Graduation, Family Reunion Party Favors for Kids. A Popular Choice for Easter Basket Stuffers. Kids mini bubble wands are the best gift for boys, girls and children will play for hours with these colorful wands.
PREMIUM QUALITY & SAFETY. Child Safe: Non-Toxic. Meet UK toy standard. Safety test approved.

CUSTOMER SATISFACTION. Providing a 100% satisfaction experience is our main priority to our customers. Feel free to message us through “contact sellers” if products don’t meet your expectations. The celebrations start at JOYIN
description: Product Description Getting Ready for the Best Season Looking for a unicorn sprinkler that sprays water from its horn? Or perhaps a collection of vibrant, hot-pink donut inflatables? Our premium summer collections have got you covered. From inflatable rafts and water guns to bubble toys and so much more, our products are designed to help you capture that perfect splashing selfie, and create lasting memories with your family and friends. Perfect Party Favor Got a summer party coming up? Our bubble wands will be the perfect party favor. Hand them out and watch the bubbles blow, creating a joyful, fun, and bubbly atmosphere for everyone to enjoy! For All Ages, All Occasions Our bubble wands are sure to brighten anyone's day - friends, family, and small children! Bring them with you on your next trip for a moment of fun anywhere, and create joyful memories that will last. Non-Toxic and Child-Safe Our bubble solution that comes with the wands has passed rigorous safety tests, ensuring that children of all ages can enjoy hours of fun without any worries. Bubble Up the Fun This Summer! We pride ourselves on offering a premier shop for all your summer needs. From trendy water accessories to poolside essentials, we are here to make this summer unforgettable! 24 pcs bubble wands 12 pcs bubble wands 72 pcs mini bubble wands 2 Giant Magic Bubble Wands, 2
